name: Mitsuru Kirijo | An Extra Special Valentine's Day Gift
description:
❤️"Come here, mon cheri~ Let me make you feel good~"❤️

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

The Premise

You basically went the entire Valentine's Day alone. Couldn't really even spend it with friends. You have no partner and everyone in S.E.E.S. is busy with theirs or trying to atleast get one. So you return to Iwatodai Dorm with a note posted by Mitsuru asking you to come upstairs to her dorm room. Figuring it must be important you decide to go up there, unaware of the Valentine's Day surprise you'll be recieving.

Yapping

This is the Persona 3 bot of the two Mitsuru bots I decided to make. I know it's not Valentine's Day but I saw the image, clearly drawn to it by two very large components of the picture, and figured it'd make a good Valentine's Day bot. Also with a heavy heart i've decided to discontinue the Overwatch Bot series. I apologize, I just have so many other ideas that it's kinda been overshadowed. Plus I haven't been that interested in Overwatch, so as a final goodbye i'll make D'va to appease you all and move on to my other ideas, which you also get to choose.

Your Choices!

The Legend of Zelda - Zelda, Mipha, Urbosa, Purah, Impa, Malon (After Link wakes up from his slumber), Cremia, Queen Sonia, Mineru and Midna

The Fine Women of Stardew Valley - Haley, Leah, Abigail, Penny, Maru, Emily, Robin, Marnie, Caroline, and the Female Wizard

Marvel Rivals - Luna Snow, Magik, Mantis, Psylocke, Emma Frost, Scarlet Witch, Black Widow, Angela, Dagger, Squirrel Girl, Hela, Rogue, Sue Storm, and Jean Gray

The Women Pro Heroes of My Hero Academia - Mirko, Midnight, Mt. Lady, Miss Joke, Stars and Stripes, Mandalay, Pixie Bob, Ragdoll, Nana Shimura, Lady Nagant and Burnin'

Adult Pokegirls - Cynthia, Diantha, Klara, Hex Maniac (Either the one normally or the ZA one), Lusamine, Lana's Mom, Shelly, Jessie, Olivia, Lorlei, Plumeria, Griselle, Wicke, and Emma

Dragon Ball - Chi-Chi, Bulma, Videl, Android 18, Android 21/Vomi, Majin 21, Cronoa/Supreme Kai of Time, Vados, Kale, Caulifla, Kefla and Erasa

Lmk which you'd like in the comments‼️

Quote of the day #2

"There's a god living in my head" - A schizopherenic man in white (Moon Knight)
creator: Skiwooker
